untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option-specific parameters (implied volatility vs historical volatility comparison, strike delta selection, days-to-expiration thresholds, position sizing as % of portfolio risk) that cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/technical indicators. The rule is fundamentally an options strategy requiring vol surface data, strike prices, and option Greeks not available in this backtester's indicator set. Approximated entry with hvol_20 < india_vix as a volatility premium proxy, but this is a poor substitute for true IV-HV spread and ATM strike selection.
translation_notes: SINCLAIR_DRY_7_0 is an options selling strategy with structural edge thesis. Cannot translate thresholds for: (1) IV-HV spread magnitude, (2) delta ranges for ATM strikes, (3) minimum DTE, (4) portfolio risk per trade %, (5) profit target %, (6) specific exit at X% of max profit. Used hvol_20 (realized vol proxy) vs india_vix (implied vol proxy) as crude approximation, but this fundamentally misses the signal's option-gamma and theta dynamics. Direction set to SHORT (selling options). Regime set to RANGING and ANY as specified. Recommend manual implementation or custom option-chain data integration.
